title: Manner of holding election
doc_html:
§197.  Manner of holding election

Consolidation elections shall be held in the manner provided by law for regular municipal elections, as far as applicable and except as otherwise provided in this Subpart.
doc_text:
§197.  Manner of holding election
Consolidation elections shall be held in the manner provided by law for regular municipal elections, as far as applicable and except as otherwise provided in this Subpart.
